title: Abigail Adams and the Revolution at Home
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Abigail Adams did not command armies, but she watched a revolution unfold from farm, household, and letter desk. This factual narrative follows her through wartime Massachusetts, political correspondence, and the sharp intelligence that made her one of the clearest observers of the American founding.

chapters.title: A Farm, a Family, and a Gathering Crisis
The Revolution Seen from a Writing Desk
